marketState: neutral-to-bullish (heat-driven demand spike vs. storage-surplus overhang)
summary: Price sits 5.3pp above its seasonal median and $0.30-0.38 above modeled fair value at every horizon, but still stays inside the fair-value band rather than looking stretched. A major heat wave is building 8-16 days out (demand +39.5% vs 5y, above the max range) on top of an already-hot next 7 days (+15.9% vs 5y), which should support near-term cooling demand and price. Working against that: storage is +175 Bcf above the 5y average with a bearish +13 Bcf surprise build, and managed money is net short (-64,808 contracts, 31st percentile), both pointing to a supply cushion and cautious positioning. Technicals are bullish on the 15m-4h timeframes (RSI 50s-60s, MACD turning positive on 1h/4h) but the daily/weekly show a 50<200 bearish EMA cross, so the intraday bounce is happening inside a larger corrective structure. Net: the near-term weather-driven upside case is credible, but the multi-week picture is capped by the storage surplus and seasonality reliability is explicitly flagged 'Low' this week.

longTerm.rationale: Seasonality favors higher prices into peak Sep strength (+5.3pp vs median, 63% odds of being higher in 4 weeks) and an extreme 8-16 day heat forecast (+39.5% vs 5y, above the max range) should keep cooling demand elevated; fair value is also rising toward price across horizons (spread narrows from +$0.38 now to +$0.21 at plus21D), meaning price stays inside the band rather than extending away from it.
longTerm.invalidation: A sustained cooldown in the 8-16D weather outlook back toward/below the 5y range, and/or a break below the $2.90-2.95 fair-value support alongside continued bearish storage surprises, would invalidate the long-term long.

shortTerm.sizing: 1R approx 0.5-1% account risk (trim size vs. long-term given the daily/weekly bearish EMA cross)
shortTerm.rationale: 15m-4h technicals are bullish (RSI in the 50s-60s, MACD positive on 1h/4h) alongside a hot 1-7 day weather read (+15.9% vs 5y, near top of its range) and slight front-month backwardation (Aug > Sep > Oct) signaling near-term tightness; price remains inside the $2.429-$3.429 fair-value band rather than overextended.
shortTerm.invalidation: A break back below $3.18 support, or RSI/MACD rolling over on the 1h/4h charts, would flip the short-term setup.

keyDrivers: 8-16 day demand forecast +39.5% vs 5y and above the max range — major heat wave building
Price is $0.30-0.38 above modeled fair value at every horizon but still inside the band
Storage +175 Bcf vs 5y with a bearish +13 Bcf surprise build
Managed money net short (-64.8k contracts, 31st percentile) — modest bearish positioning
Daily/weekly EMA shows 50<200 (bearish) even as 15m-4h momentum is bullish
risks: Seasonality reliability is flagged 'Low' this week (51pp spread across the 16y history)

Storage surplus and net-short COT positioning could cap rallies into the shoulder season
